description: Add TTL-based caching to data loader with cache expiration and manual cache clearing
systemPrompt: You are a code agent. Use the available tools to read files, write fixes, and run tests. Your goal is to make all tests pass.

tools.readFile: Reads a file from the workspace. Arg: file path (e.g., 'src/utils.mjs'). Returns file contents as string.
tools.runTests: Runs the test suite and returns output. No arguments needed.
tools.listFiles: Lists all files in the workspace. No arguments needed. Returns newline-separated file paths.
